commands.repair_reason: Contributor or maintainer action is needed because the branch lacks after-fix real behavior proof, is conflicting, and changes credential propagation policy.; Needs attention: The patch changes credential propagation semantics and can copy OAuth refresh material across sibling agent stores without explicit opt-in.; Review finding: [P1] Restrict OAuth auth-profile sync to intended contexts — src/plugins/provider-auth... (sha=4cdf6ac3fed626b172d6652486802e8456859ecf)
commands.review_summary:
The PR routes plugin-provider auth-profile writes through a sibling-sync helper, syncs Anthropic token and OAuth credentials to sibling agent dirs, adds Anthropic token sync coverage, updates related mocks, and adds DeepSeek to the provider contract registry.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-introduced regression: source inspection shows every OAuth credential becomes sibling-syncable and the generic plugin auth path applies that predicate. The original linked gateway failure is still configuration-dependent on current main because runtime read-through can mask missing physical sibling copies.
commands.review_followup: Contributor or maintainer action is needed because the branch lacks after-fix real behavior proof, is conflicting, and changes credential propagation policy.

target.title: Fix Anthropic setup-token sibling auth sync
